sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47339" key="h(mi/fatos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμί-φᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n47339.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half</tr_> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δίφατος</foreign>), Id.</sense> </entryFree>
